requirement_topic.en: IANOR / IEC 61851 EV Charging System Safety
requirement_topic.zh: IANOR / IEC 61851电动汽车充电系统安全
requirement_topic.zht: IANOR / IEC 61851電動汽車充電系統安全

summary.en: IANOR is Algeria's national standardization body. For EV charging equipment, the IEC route should be treated as the reference technical route unless an Algeria-specific NA standard or project specification states otherwise. IEC 61851-1 covers general requirements for conductive EV charging systems, including control-pilot functions, charging modes, protective earthing, leakage current, and safety interlocks. IEC 61851-23 covers DC EV charging stations. Importers and project owners should confirm whether IANOR conformity documentation, declaration of conformity, test reports, or third-party certification are required for the specific product and procurement route.
summary.zh: IANOR是阿尔及利亚国家标准化机构。对于电动汽车充电设备，除非阿尔及利亚特定NA标准或项目规范另有规定，应将IEC路径作为参考技术路径。IEC 61851-1涵盖传导式电动汽车充电系统通用要求，包括控制导引功能、充电模式、保护接地、泄漏电流和安全联锁。IEC 61851-23涵盖直流电动汽车充电站。进口商和项目业主应确认具体产品及采购路径是否要求IANOR合格评定文件、符合性声明、测试报告或第三方认证。
summary.zht: IANOR是阿爾及利亞國家標準化機構。對於電動汽車充電設備，除非阿爾及利亞特定NA標準或項目規範另有規定，應將IEC路徑作為參考技術路徑。IEC 61851-1涵蓋傳導式電動汽車充電系統通用要求，包括控制導引功能、充電模式、保護接地、洩漏電流和安全聯鎖。IEC 61851-23涵蓋直流電動汽車充電站。進口商和項目業主應確認具體產品及採購路徑是否要求IANOR合格評定文件、符合性聲明、測試報告或第三方認證。

standards_or_laws: IANOR Algerian standardization and conformity framework
IEC 61851-1 (electric vehicle conductive charging systems — general requirements)
IEC 62196 connector standards referenced by IEC 61851 implementations

summary.en: China EV charger safety evidence is usually built around GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems and related GB/T 18487 parts. Although GB/T 18487 is technically related to IEC 61851, China domestic test reports may differ in connector configuration, test sequence, communication assumptions, marking, and editions. They should be used as engineering references, not as automatic Algeria or IEC compliance evidence.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电设备安全证据通常围绕GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统及相关GB/T 18487部分建立。尽管GB/T 18487在技术上与IEC 61851相关，但中国国内测试报告可能在接口配置、测试顺序、通信假设、标志和版本方面不同。其可作为工程参考，但不能自动作为阿尔及利亚或IEC合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電設備安全證據通常圍繞GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統及相關GB/T 18487部分建立。儘管GB/T 18487在技術上與IEC 61851相關，但中國國內測試報告可能在接口配置、測試順序、通訊假設、標誌和版本方面不同。其可作為工程參考，但不能自動作為阿爾及利亞或IEC合規證據。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 61851-1 evidence for AC and general charger safety, and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, on the Algeria IEC-connector hardware variant. Confirm whether the importer, IANOR conformity path, or public tender requires accredited laboratory reports, a declaration of conformity, Arabic/French labels, and installation manuals. GB/T 18487.1-2023 reports can support a gap analysis but should not be treated as accepted Algeria compliance proof.
gap.zh: 应在阿尔及利亚IEC接口硬件型号上取得交流及通用充电安全的IEC 61851-1证据，以及直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据。应确认进口商、IANOR合格评定路径或公共招标是否要求认可实验室报告、符合性声明、阿拉伯语/法语标签和安装手册。GB/T 18487.1-2023报告可支持差距分析，但不应视为已被阿尔及利亚接受的合规证明。
gap.zht: 應在阿爾及利亞IEC接口硬體型號上取得交流及通用充電安全的IEC 61851-1證據，以及直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據。應確認進口商、IANOR合格評定路徑或公共招標是否要求認可實驗室報告、符合性聲明、阿拉伯語/法語標籤和安裝手冊。GB/T 18487.1-2023報告可支持差距分析，但不應視為已被阿爾及利亞接受的合規證明。

mandatory_status.target: Expected technical route for EV charger safety; exact mandatory conformity route must be confirmed with IANOR, importer, and project owner for the product and procurement path
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic charger safety under GB/T 18487; not automatically accepted for Algeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 61851-1 and IEC 61851-23 evidence for the Algeria IEC-connector charger variant. China GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence is useful for engineering comparison but should not be claimed as automatic IANOR or Algeria acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应为阿尔及利亚IEC接口充电设备型号使用IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23证据。中国GB/T 18487.1-2023证据可用于工程对比，但不应宣称其自动获得IANOR或阿尔及利亚接受。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應為阿爾及利亞IEC接口充電設備型號使用IEC 61851-1和IEC 61851-23證據。中國GB/T 18487.1-2023證據可用於工程對比，但不應宣稱其自動獲得IANOR或阿爾及利亞接受。
